name: Smooth Slim Rum Eggnog
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-1.5 quart pan, blend milk with cornstarch and 1/8 teaspoon nutmeg until smooth. Set aside.
2. Using an electric mixer, whip egg whites until foamy. Gradually add sugar while beating at high speed until the mixture holds stiff peaks.
3. Over high heat, gently simmer the milk mixture in a separate saucepan until just boiling.
4. With the mixer on medium speed, pour the hot milk into the egg white mixture, scraping the sides of the bowl to incorporate well.
5. Allow the mixture to stand for at least 4 minutes (the boiling milk helps kill salmonella).
6. Stir in rum. Serve immediately or chill by covering and refrigerating until cold, about 3 hours up to 8.
7. Pour through a fine strainer into glasses. Dust with nutmeg before serving.
